message:
test(runtime_compat): variant-dispatch coverage for broadcast + semaphore error enums

10 new tests covering under-tested Display impls and error variant paths:
- broadcast_try_recv: Closed + Lagged variants (only Empty was tested)
- broadcast::RecvError Display: Lagged + Closed text verification
- broadcast::TryRecvError Display: all 3 variants (Empty/Closed/Lagged)
- broadcast::SendError Display text verification
- TryAcquireError Display: exact text for NoPermits + Closed
- AcquireError Display: Cancelled + PolledAfterCompletion (previously untested)
- broadcast::TryRecvError std::error::Error trait coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
